welcome_title:
Welcome to Matrix V2 OS! 🚀
No AI Agents are currently configured.
language_selection:
Please select your language:
[1] English
[2] Italiano

Reply with the number.
invalid_selection_number: Invalid selection. Reply with a valid number.
opencode_provider_prompt:
Which provider are you using for OpenCode?
[1] OpenRouter
[2] Local/Ollama
[3] DeepSeek
[4] OpenAi
[5] Anthropic
[6] Google
[7] Custom

Reply with the number.
(type 'back' to go back)
opencode_auth_method_prompt:
How would you like to connect OpenRouter?
[1] API Key (manual)
[2] Quick Login (one-click OAuth link)

Reply with the number.
(type 'back' to go back)
opencode_api_key_prompt:
You selected provider %s. Please paste your API Key below.
Otherwise, just reply 'skip'.
(type 'back' to go back)
opencode_openrouter_quick_auth_prompt:
Matrix generated a Quick Login link for OpenRouter.

✅ Authorize here:
%s

Once authorized, the server will automatically detect it. Alternatively, reply with 'skip' to use an API Key manually.
(type 'back' to go back)
opencode_model_prompt:
Which model would you like to use?
Suggested examples (type directly):
- minimax/abab6.5
- anthropic/claude-3-opus
- openai/gpt-4o
- google/gemini-pro

Type your model choice:
(type 'back' to go back)
codex_auth_method_prompt:
How would you like to authenticate Codex?
[1] OpenAI API Key (for API access)
[2] ChatGPT / ChatGPT Plus (Matrix will run login for you)

(type 'back' to go back)
codex_openai_key_prompt:
Paste your OpenAI API Key below.

Get it at: https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
(type 'skip' if already configured)
codex_device_auth_prompt:
Matrix started the Codex login process.

✅ Open this link in your browser:
%s

🔑 Enter this one-time code:
%s

When you have completed login in the browser, reply here with 'done' (or 'fatto').
generic_api_key_prompt:
You selected %s.
Please paste your API Key below:
(type 'back' to go back)
agent_configured_success:
✅ %s has been successfully configured!

Matrix OS is now online and intelligent. You can start typing normally or use /action to orchestrate the system.
agent_configure_failed: Failed to configure agent: %v. Please try again.
help_text:
Matrix V2 OS - Commands:
/help - Show this help message
/wizard - Restart the onboarding wizard
/status - Show current work status
/now - Show the current workspace operating state
/timeline [workspace] - Show recent workspace timeline events
/decisions [workspace] - Show recent orchestration decisions
/why - Show the latest orchestration decision for the current workspace
/memory - Show recent workspace work memory
/snapshots - Show recent workspace snapshots
/snapshot [note] - Create a workspace snapshot
/use <workspace> - Switch to a workspace
/workspaces - List configured workspaces
/continue - Continue the current work context
/resume [workspace] - Resume the last or selected workspace context
/review [workspace] - Switch to review mode for the current or selected workspace
/explain [workspace] - Switch to explain mode for the current or selected workspace
/triage [workspace] - Switch to triage mode for the current or selected workspace
/handoff <agent> - Hand off the current workspace to another specialist
/session new [agent] - Start a new session
/session list - List recent sessions
/session switch <id/alias> - Switch active session
/session cancel [target] - Cancel the active or selected remote session
/cancel or /stop - Shortcut for /session cancel
/workspace list - List configured workspaces
/workspace status - Show current workspace context
/workspace switch <workspace> - Switch to a workspace session
/workspace bind <workspace> - Bind the active session to a workspace
/workspace snapshot [note] - Create a workspace snapshot
/action <request> - Orchestrate the system (Admin only)
wizard_start: Starting the onboarding wizard... Please follow the instructions.
usage_session: Usage: /session new [agent] | /session switch <idx/uuid/alias/agent/remote> | /session cancel [idx/uuid/alias/remote] | /session delete [idx/uuid/alias/remote] | /session name <alias> | /session list | /session status
session_history_empty: No session history found for this chat.
session_history_switch_empty: No session history to switch to.
session_history_switch_no_prev: No previous session to switch to.
session_switch_resolve_fail_new: Could not find recent session. Started new %s session: %s
workspace_status_empty: No workspace context is active for this channel.
status_empty: No active work context for this chat.
